summary: Iteration 14 testing completed - All requested features verified working correctly. Environment switcher toggles between Dev/Ephemeral with correct cortex URLs. Eval Runs displays grouped view with collapsible sections. RunEvalModal has mandatory group_id field. Dataset CRUD operations functional. Agent delete restricted to database-sourced agents only.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/capabilities returns correct feature flags (data_source=builder_api, read_only=false)
Backend: GET /api/eval/groups/{group_id}/jobs returns jobs for existing group (grp-13)
Backend: GET /api/eval/groups/{group_id}/jobs with pagination params works
Backend: Non-existent group returns empty jobs array (200 status)
Backend: GET /api/eval/stats returns status counts object
Backend: GET /api/eval/jobs with status filter works
Backend: GET /api/eval/datasets lists datasets correctly
Backend: GET /api/eval/datasets/types/{type} filters by type
Backend: GET /api/eval/datasets/types/{type}/instances/{id} returns instance details
Backend: GET /api/agents lists agents from Builder API
Backend: GET /api/agents/{id} returns agent details with source field
Backend: GET /api/eval/health and /api/builder/health return healthy status
Frontend: Environment Switcher visible in sidebar with Dev/Ephemeral options
Frontend: Dev environment shows cortex URL http://agentsdk.internal-staging.emergentagent.com
Frontend: Ephemeral mode shows text input for eph name
Frontend: Ephemeral with name 'builder-1' generates correct URL https://cortex-builder-1-...
Frontend: Eval Runs page shows 44 groups as collapsible cards
Frontend: Each group card shows group_id, job count badge, agent badges, status summary
Frontend: Expanding a group fetches jobs via GET /api/eval/groups/{group_id}/jobs
Frontend: Individual job rows are clickable and navigate to job detail
Frontend: RunEvalModal has mandatory Group ID field in step 4 (Configure)
Frontend: Next button disabled when Group ID empty (validation working)
Frontend: Next button enabled after filling Group ID
Frontend: Cortex URL auto-populated from environment switcher
Frontend: Review step shows Group ID correctly
Frontend: Datasets page shows 50 datasets with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Dataset type filter works (filtered by Scratch Bench)
Frontend: Dataset edit modal opens correctly
Frontend: Agent list shows fs/db source badges for 112 agents (110 fs, 2 db)
Frontend: Database agent test123 has Delete option in dropdown menu
Frontend: Delete confirmation dialog appears for database agents
Frontend: Filesystem agents do NOT have Delete option (only View, Clone, Run Eval, Export YAML)
Frontend: Agent Editor for database agent test123 has enabled Save button
critical_code_review_comments: Environment switcher properly persists to localStorage (acm_env, acm_eph_name)
EnvProvider correctly wraps app and provides cortexUrl via useEnv() hook
RunEvalModal correctly uses useEnv() to get cortexUrl and auto-populates expCortexUrl
Group jobs endpoint properly proxies to http://harness-eval.int-worker.dev.emergentagent.com/api/v1/groups/{group_id}/evals
Agent delete correctly restricted to database-sourced agents only (filesystem agents show no delete option)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from Eval API and Builder API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 14 features verified working. Key test IDs: env-switcher, env-select, eph-name-input, group-{group_id}, eval-group-id, review-group-id, delete-agent-{id}, source-badge-{id}. Environment switcher in sidebar bottom shows Dev/Ephemeral with cortex URL display. Database agents (db badge) have delete option; filesystem agents (fs badge) do not.
